summary: Follow-up observations discovered while implementing strict release closeout and batch manifest verification.

observations.problem: The public test suite requires at least one public-safe seed report under ops/reports, but this working tree currently has no seed-*.json reports.
observations.why_it_matters: A release-lane change can pass its targeted public contracts while the aggregate make test-public gate remains red for unrelated missing seed fixtures, making closeout status noisy.
observations.automation_candidate: Add a deterministic seed report generator or checked public-safe fixture policy that creates schema-valid seed-*.json artifacts without private path references.
observations.suggested_followup: Automated on 2026-05-03: seed public mirror checks now read tests/fixtures/public-seed-reports/seed-public-smoke.json, a schema-valid public-safe fixture with no private path prefixes; make test-public passes.
